title: Surgeon Vacancy at Merck India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Merck India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Merck India in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Merck India:
Merck India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Merck India!
